mapper.sql: select job_id, job_code, job_name, dept_id, dept_name, term_id, term_name, salary_amount, salary_unit, work_place, weekly_hours, headcount, applied_count, contact_person, contact_phone, open_start_time, open_end_time, publish_status, job_desc, job_requirements, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sc_affair_work_study_job
mapper.insert: insert into sc_affair_work_study_job (job_code, job_name, dept_id, dept_name, term_id, term_name, salary_amount, salary_unit, work_place, weekly_hours, headcount, applied_count, contact_person, contact_phone, open_start_time, open_end_time, publish_status, job_desc, job_requirements, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{jobCode}, #{jobName}, #{deptId}, #{deptName}, #{termId}, #{termName}, #{salaryAmount}, #{salaryUnit}, #{workPlace}, #{weeklyHours}, #{headcount}, #{appliedCount}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{openStartTime}, #{openEndTime}, #{publishStatus}, #{jobDesc}, #{jobRequirements}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_affair_work_study_job job_code = #{jobCode}, job_name = #{jobName}, dept_id = #{deptId}, dept_name = #{deptName}, term_id = #{termId}, term_name = #{termName}, salary_amount = #{salaryAmount}, salary_unit = #{salaryUnit}, work_place = #{workPlace}, weekly_hours = #{weeklyHours}, headcount = #{headcount}, applied_count = #{appliedCount}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, open_start_time = #{openStartTime}, open_end_time = #{openEndTime}, publish_status = #{publishStatus}, job_desc = #{jobDesc}, job_requirements = #{jobRequirements}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = sysdate() where job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.delete: delete from sc_affair_work_study_job where job_id in #{jobId}
